pass1_quick_scan.goal: Understand the problem and whether the proposed solution works

steps.objective: Understand the main contribution and results
questions_to_answer: What problem does the paper propose to solve?
steps.expected_output: Understand the main claim and results of the paper

steps.objective: Get an overview of the proposed model and results
questions_to_answer: What does the proposed model architecture look like?
steps.expected_output: Visual understanding of the model and results

questions_to_answer: What is the motivation behind the paper?
What is the problem being addressed?
steps.expected_output: Understand the context and motivation behind the paper

pass2_method_understanding.goal: Understand what was built and how it was evaluated

questions_to_answer: What are the key components of the proposed model?
How does the encoder and decoder work?
How does the scaled dot-product attention work?

steps.objective: Understand how the model was trained
questions_to_answer: What data was used to train the model?
steps.expected_output: Understand how the model was trained

pass3_deep_analysis.goal: Critical analysis of whether the method is sound and generalizable

steps.objective: Understand the position-wise feed-forward networks and embeddings
questions_to_answer: What is the role of position-wise feed-forward networks?
How are embeddings and softmax used?
steps.expected_output: Understand the position-wise feed-forward networks and embeddings

questions_to_answer: How does the proposed model perform compared to baselines?
steps.expected_output: Analyze the results and understand the performance of the proposed model

steps.objective: Understand the limitations and future work
questions_to_answer: What are the limitations of the proposed model?
What are the potential future directions?
steps.expected_output: Understand the limitations and future work

final_user_task.summary_task: Summarize the main contribution and results of the paper
reflection_questions: What are the key takeaways from the paper?
How can the proposed model be applied to other problems?
